subcodes.first_line: O faithful, patient and eloquent servant of the Blessed Beauty! In truth, in the path of the Glorious Lord, every tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق صابر ناطق جمال مبارک انصاف چنین است که در سبیل رب جلیل هر بلای
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
